name: iMessage (macOS 12 Monterey)
description: iMessage channel plugin for macOS 12 Monterey using direct database polling

dmPolicy.description: Direct message policy: open, pairing, allowlist, or disabled

allowFrom.description: List of allowed phone numbers or emails for DMs

groupPolicy.description: Group message policy: open, allowlist, or disabled

groupAllowFrom.description: List of allowed senders in group chats

adminList.description: List of admin phone numbers (slash command access)

requirePrefixForAllowlist.description: Whether allowlisted senders need to use prefix

pollIntervalMs.label: Poll Interval (ms)
pollIntervalMs.help: How often to check for new messages (default: 10000ms)

allowFrom.label: Allowed DM Senders
allowFrom.help: Phone numbers or emails for DMs

adminList.label: Admin List
adminList.help: Phone numbers with slash command access

prefix.label: Command Prefix
prefix.help: Optional prefix required to trigger the bot

textChunkLimit.label: Text Chunk Limit
textChunkLimit.help: Maximum characters per message (iMessage has limits)
